appInfo.name: GrowVPD Pro
appInfo.architecture: Single-Activity Jetpack Compose (Android), SwiftUI + KMP shared (iOS)

proUnlocks: Multi-device sync (Phone-as-Hub + QR pairing + Ed25519 + LAN/Cloud relay)
Full PDF + JSON exports with photos
Photo watermarking with live VPD/temp/RH overlay

positioning.primaryMessage: The only cannabis automation that works without a $2,500 controller. Bring your own devices. VPD-first automation. 11 languages. Local-first privacy. $3.99/mo.
positioning.secondaryMessage: Your grow doesn't die when the cloud goes down. Growlink is cloud-only, TrolMaster relies on AWS. We talk LAN direct to your devices.

targetAudience.primary: Hobby to prosumer cannabis growers (5M+ globally) with 1-4 tents and existing Tuya / AC Infinity / Mars Hydro gear
targetAudience.tertiary: Home Assistant users wanting cannabis-specific analytics layer

notTargeting: Commercial cannabis MSOs ($2-5k hardware budgets — Growlink owns them)
pillars: Automation Engine 2.0 (algorithms from OpenGrowBox / GanjOS / HA)
Platform Excellence (audited Kotlin clients vs HA reference)
Onboarding + Polish (8 wizards, hardware matrix, 11-language parity)

platforms.name: Tuya / Smart Life
platforms.transport: LAN (v3.3/v3.4/v3.5) + Cloud Bridge per-user + Tuya Pulsar real-time MQTT push + Zigbee sub-devices via hub + BLE direct
platforms.supportedProductIds: 1452 unique IDs across 200+ vendors (sourced from tuya-local Apache 2.0)
pairingMethods: Cloud Bridge wizard (Path A — recommended for battery sensors)
OAuth extract-unlink (PENDING — feature flag OAUTH_EXTRACT_UNLINK_ENABLED=false, blocked on Tuya OEM clientid approval)
limitations: wsdcg battery WiFi TH sensors update every 15-60 min (recommend Zigbee alternative like Aqara WSDCGQ11LM)
co2bj CO2 sensors same low-power limitation
50-device cap on free Tuya IoT trial (commercial $25k/yr deferred until 1000+ paid users)
wsdcg LAN access permanently blocked by firmware

platforms.name: AC Infinity
platforms.transport: Cloud REST + AI controller PUT endpoint + IPC camera REST + BLE (Controller 69 BT-only)
pairingMethods: Sign in with email + password in Settings → Connected Accounts
limitations: Rate limiting on rapid PATCH calls

platforms.name: Mars Hydro
platforms.transport: REST auth + BLE pairing-only + MQTT cloud control (mTLS)
pairingMethods: Sign in via REST → MQTT subscribes
BLE scan to discover device PID
limitations: BLE used for pairing only (iConnect BLE control unreliable)

platforms.name: Spider Farmer
platforms.transport: WiFi MQTT (sister of Mars Hydro under MZ) + BLE offline GATT
supportedDevices: Spider Farmer lights, fans, controllers using SF protocol
pairingMethods: Sign in via Spider Farmer Smart Cloud REST
limitations: Same firmware family as Mars Hydro — same caveats apply

platforms.name: Vivosun
platforms.transport: REST + AWS IoT MQTT (WebSocket + SigV4) + BLE (AeroLab THB only) + RTSP (GrowCam C4)

camera: GrowCam C4 (RTSP port 554, 2K QHD 4MP, IR, 2-way audio)

pairingMethods: Sign in via REST → AWS IoT WebSocket subscribes for shadow updates
limitations: Camera control limited to RTSP stream view

platforms.name: Bluelab Edenic
pairingMethods: Generate API key in Edenic mobile app → provide API key + Organization ID
platforms.rateLimit: 1 request per minute (we poll every 70 seconds)
limitations: No humidity/VPD (Bluelab focuses on water/nutrient solution)

platforms.name: SANlight
platforms.transport: Bluetooth Mesh (Nordic nRF52832 with S132 v7.3.0)
pairingMethods: BLE Mesh provisioning (uses guessed UUIDs from APK reverse engineering)
limitations: EXPERIMENTAL — BLE Mesh stack uses guessed UUIDs
Community confirms nobody has cracked proprietary protocol in 2.5 years
Recommended fallback: 0-10V GrowControl adapter → AC Infinity for stable dimming

platforms.name: Test devices (built-in simulator)
platforms.useCase: Demo data, screenshots, automation rule testing without hardware
platforms.activation: Settings → Demo data → Seed demo data

automationHooks: Universal — any device on a plug
Fire-and-forget priority alarm + cut all reachable plugs

features.name: Interactive VPD chart
features.description: Color-coded VPD heatmap per growth stage with °C/°F toggle, tent switching, save-to-diary, target VPD band overlay

features.name: PPFD meter
features.description: Combined Meter + Guide tab using phone light sensor; smart sensor toggle (Pro) reads live PPFD

features.name: Bluetooth temp/humidity sensor
features.description: Read live data from third-party BLE sensors (SensorPush, Govee, SwitchBot, Ruuvi, Inkbird)

features.name: Smart device automation
features.description: 8 platforms, VPD-centric multi-tent optimization, ClimateIntelligence engine

features.name: Blueprint auto-setpoints
features.description: On stage transition, auto-push new targets to all connected devices

features.name: Emergency override (D2)
features.description: Triggers on temp spike (>maxTemp+2°C) or condensation imminent (dewpoint within 0.5°C of air); bypasses cooldowns

features.name: Auto stage detection (D4)
features.description: 6h periodic worker; 3-signal voting (photoperiod/VWC/elapsed days); proposes via notification with Confirm/Dismiss

features.name: Sunrise/sunset light ramp (D1)
features.description: Default 5-min ramp; native pass-through for Mars Hydro/SANlight; client-side stepping for others

features.name: Night CO2 hold (D3)
features.description: At lights-off, CO2 target → 0 ppm (ambient); saves gas + reduces stress

features.name: Three-point target band (D5)
features.description: Sensor cards show min/target/max gradient bar with current-value needle

features.name: Stagnation safety (A1)
features.description: Detects sensor/pump fault when 3+ consecutive readings stuck below 40% VWC

features.name: Deadband stability hold (A2)
features.description: When VPD inside band for ≥2 min, suppresses further actions for 5 min

features.name: Leaf temperature offset (A3)
features.description: Per-tent setting (-10 to +10°C); adjusts VPD calculation for canopy vs air temp

features.name: Day/night climate offsets (A4)
features.description: Auto-applies night offsets (-3°C, +20% RH, +0.3kPa VPD, 0 ppm CO2)

features.name: Weighted deviations (A5)
features.description: 40% temp / 60% humidity blend in priority decisions

features.name: Hero banner
features.description: 200dp photo background, dark overlay, title + strain top-left, live sensor chips with trend arrows

features.name: Stage timeline
features.description: Horizontal LazyRow of 6 milestone nodes; tap reached → edit, tap future → advance

features.name: Multi-strain editor
features.description: One grow can carry multiple strains with per-strain plant counts

features.name: Bulk activity recording
features.description: Water all / Feed all / Note all multi-grow flow with atomic transaction

features.name: Photo watermarking
features.description: Canvas overlay at capture; selectable timestamp/grow name/stage+week/live VPD/temp/RH/custom text in 4 corners

features.name: Strain entity + lineage
features.description: First-class Strain table with breeder, indica/sativa%, autoflower flag, cycle days, seed count, recursive ancestry/descendants

features.name: Sensor hourly rollups + trend arrows
features.description: Periodic 15-min WorkManager; 30-day raw retention; trend arrows (↑↓→) via 16-sample moving average

features.name: Harvest dialog + cycle time + yield
features.description: HarvestDialog + CuringDialog + HarvestStatsCard with cycle time, total yield, per-plant, wet/dry ratio; editable

features.name: AI disease diagnostics
features.description: Photo of leaf → AI color analysis + 5-step diagnostic questionnaire; 30+ diseases with product recommendations

features.name: Export & sharing
features.description: Full PDF including Lifecycle table + Harvest summary block; JSON backup; share with photos

features.name: 8 platforms
features.description: Tuya, AC Infinity, Mars Hydro, Spider Farmer, Vivosun, Bluelab Edenic, SANlight (experimental), Test devices

features.name: Tuya Cloud Bridge wizard
features.description: 5-step guided setup; HMAC validator + encrypted credential store

features.name: Tuya OAuth-extract-unlink (PENDING)
features.description: One-tap 'Sign in with Tuya' → auto-extract local_keys → optional unlink. Code shipped behind feature flag, awaiting Tuya OEM clientid approval

features.name: Multi-device sync (Phone-as-Hub)
features.description: Ed25519 keypair, QR pairing, HLC clock, LWW merge, LAN TCP transport, Cloud Relay fallback

features.name: Hub mode
features.description: Designate one phone as 24/7 relay anchor (Android foreground service; iOS BGTaskScheduler best-effort)

features.name: Cloud Relay fallback
features.description: When LAN sync unreachable, encrypted messages route through our cloud relay

features.name: Tuya Pulsar real-time push
features.description: Per-user MQTT WSS subscriber; AES-128-ECB decoder; ~ms latency vs 5-10s polling

features.name: BLE pairing
features.description: Mars Hydro, Spider Farmer, SANlight, Vivosun AeroLab THB

features.name: Hardware compatibility matrix
features.description: Searchable list of 27+ verified devices with status badges; 270+ entries in product registry

features.name: Equipment database
features.description: 200+ products: lights, tents, ventilation, fans, humidifiers from Mars Hydro, Spider Farmer, AC Infinity, Lumatek, Gavita

features.name: Equipment profiles
features.description: Save your tent setup once, load into new grows

features.name: Setup builder
features.description: Suggest tent configurations based on space + budget

features.name: Crashlytics opt-in
features.description: Off by default in debug, on by default in release; 5 anonymous custom keys; no PII

features.description: 4 sections: local-first, vendor cloud, multi-device sync, crash reporting; Canvas-drawn 3-flow diagram

features.name: Demo data orchestrator
features.description: Settings button creates strain catalogue, 3 demo grows, sensor history, automation rules; tagged for safe clearing

features.name: Onboarding wizards (8 platforms)

features.name: App lock with PIN/biometric

features.name: Photo privacy
features.description: Hide photos from device gallery, stealth mode, disguised icon

features.name: No ads
features.description: Forever. Ever. We don't sell ad space.

glossary.definition: Vapor Pressure Deficit. Difference between water vapor pressure at saturation and actual air vapor pressure. Drives transpiration; primary metric for tent climate optimization. Measured in kPa (typically 0.4-1.8).
VPD computed using leaf temperature instead of air temperature. Leaves typically 1-3°C cooler than air under LED → leaf VPD is lower than air VPD. Critical for accuracy.
Photosynthetic Photon Flux Density. Light intensity at canopy in µmol/m²/s. Drives photosynthesis.
Daily Light Integral. Cumulative PPFD over 24h, expressed as mol/m²/day.
Electrical Conductivity. Measure of nutrient salt concentration in solution (mS/cm or µS/cm or ppm 500/700).
Acidity/alkalinity. 5.5-6.5 typical for cannabis hydro/coco; 6.0-7.0 for soil.
Light/dark cycle ratio. 18/6 = 18h light + 6h dark (typical veg). 12/12 = flower trigger for photoperiod strains. 20/4 or 24/0 = autoflower.
Cannabis strain that flowers based on age (typically 60-90 days) regardless of photoperiod. Genetics include ruderalis.
Substrate moisture loss between irrigations. % drop from saturation peak to next irrigation start. Used in crop steering.
Manipulation of irrigation, EC, and environment to push plants toward vegetative or generative growth. WC%/EC tracking is key signal.
Grow tent — enclosed structure (typically 2'x2' to 5'x5'+). Each tent is a unit of climate control in GrowVPD Pro.
One phone designated as 24/7 relay anchor. Android: foreground service. iOS: APNs silent push + BGTaskScheduler. Limited on iOS due to App Store policy.
Self-service Tuya IoT trial setup wizard. User creates own free Tuya developer account, pastes credentials, we encrypt + subscribe to per-user Pulsar MQTT push.
Future one-tap Tuya flow: 'Sign in with Tuya' → auto-extract local_key per device → optionally unlink from Tuya. PENDING approval (business task #87).
Ed25519 keypair-based P2P sync between phones. QR pairing, HLC clock, LWW merge, LAN TCP transport with Cloud Relay fallback.
Photo capture overlay with live VPD/temp/RH + grow name/stage/week + custom text. 4 corner positions. Per-tent enable. Pro feature.
Stability range where automation rules stop firing despite values inside the band. Prevents thrashing. Default 2-min dwell + 5-min hold (A2).
Difference between turn-on and turn-off thresholds. Prevents rapid cycling.
D2 safety mode: bypasses all cooldowns when temp spike (>+2°C above max) or condensation imminent (dewpoint within 0.5°C of air temp). Forces 100% exhaust + cooling.
UI representation: gradient bar with min/target/max ticks + current-value needle. Color-coded by zone proximity (D5).
A1: detects soil moisture sensor stuck below 40% for 3+ consecutive readings. Suppresses baseline learning + UI alert.
Approximation formula computing dewpoint from temp + RH. Used in D2 condensation trigger.
Capability tag indicating device firmware supports gradual dimming (Mars Hydro setPeriod sunrise mode, SANlight BLE Mesh bleSetDaylightSchedule).
Tuya's real-time event stream. We subscribe via MQTT WSS on port 8285 (/mqtt path). AES-128-ECB encrypted payload.
Cloudflare Worker FCM relay for cloud-push-only sensors. ~12 user trial capacity. Being phased out as Cloud Bridge wizard ramps up.
Stage-aware target preset bundle. On stage transition, BlueprintExecutor pushes new setpoints to all connected devices.
Horizontal milestone widget on grow detail screen. 6 nodes: Seedling, Veg, Flower, Drying, Curing, Harvested.
Audit-log row capturing lifecycle events (CREATED, STAGE_CHANGE, ARCHIVED, RESTORED, STRAIN_CHANGED, HARVEST, CURED). Structured JSON metadata in note column.
Hybrid Logical Clock. Used in multi-device sync to order distributed diary writes deterministically.
Last-Writer-Wins conflict resolution. Per-field LWW for diary entries during sync.
Android code shrinker + obfuscator. Reduces release APK from 46 MB → 18 MB.
Bring Your Own Devices. Our positioning: works with whatever Tuya/AC Infinity/Mars Hydro/etc. you already own.
Per-device UI badge: VERIFIED (field-tested) / BETA (works but limited testing) / EXPERIMENTAL (use at your own risk) / CLOUD_ONLY (no LAN path).

faqs.q: What is GrowVPD Pro?
faqs.a: Indoor grow companion app combining VPD chart, grow diary, smart device automation across 8 platforms, AI disease diagnostics, equipment database, and 11-language localization. Local-first privacy.

faqs.q: Which devices do you support?
faqs.a: 8 platforms — Tuya/Smart Life, AC Infinity, Mars Hydro, Spider Farmer, Vivosun, Bluelab Edenic, SANlight (experimental), and a built-in Test devices simulator. 270+ verified models in compatibility matrix.

faqs.q: Is it offline?
faqs.a: Yes — VPD chart, diary, photos, and core features run 100% offline. Smart device automation requires network access to your devices (or our Cloud Bridge for Tuya battery sensors). No data sold or shared.

faqs.q: Which platforms is it on?
faqs.a: Android 7+ in Beta. iOS 15+ in development via KMP shared module.

faqs.q: How much does it cost?
faqs.a: Free tier is fully usable (1 tent, 3 devices, manual diary). Pro is $3.99/month, $24.99/year (48% saving), or $49.99 lifetime.

faqs.q: How many languages?
faqs.a: 11 — Czech, English, German, Spanish, Dutch, French, Italian, Portuguese, Polish, Thai, Hebrew.

faqs.q: How do I add my first device?
faqs.a: Open Automatizace tab → Add device → choose your platform → follow 3-5 step wizard. For Tuya battery sensors, Cloud Bridge wizard is recommended (5 minutes setup).

faqs.q: I have a Tuya WiFi smart plug — does it work?
faqs.a: Yes, fully — LAN local control via v3.5 protocol. Add via Tuya wizard, sign into Smart Life, devices auto-discover.

faqs.q: I have a Tuya battery TH sensor — does it work?
faqs.a: Yes via Cloud Bridge (LAN access permanently blocked by firmware). Sensor updates every 15-60 min by design. Consider Zigbee alternative (Aqara WSDCGQ11LM) for live data.

faqs.q: Do I need any hardware to start?
faqs.a: No. VPD chart + diary work standalone with manual entries. Smart device features kick in once you connect at least one supported device.

faqs.q: How do I import my existing grow diary?
faqs.a: Currently no third-party import; manual entry. Multi-device sync (Pro) replicates between paired phones via QR.

faqs.q: How do I connect AC Infinity controller?
faqs.a: Settings → Connected Accounts → AC Infinity → email + password. Devices auto-discover. Supports 69 Pro, 69 Pro+, AI+, Outlet AI, Outlet AI+, Spectron camera.

faqs.q: Mars Hydro / Spider Farmer setup?
faqs.a: Sign in with email + password → BLE scan to discover device → MQTT subscribes for live status. WiFi required during pairing.

faqs.q: Vivosun setup?
faqs.a: Sign in via REST → AWS IoT WebSocket subscribes for shadow updates. AeroLab THB is BLE-only.

faqs.q: Bluelab Edenic setup?
faqs.a: Generate API key in Edenic mobile app (Account Settings → API Keys). Provide API key + Organization ID. We poll telemetry every 70 seconds.

faqs.q: SANlight setup?
faqs.a: BLE Mesh provisioning is EXPERIMENTAL. We recommend the 0-10V GrowControl bridge path connected to AC Infinity for reliable dimming.

faqs.q: How do I set up Tuya Cloud Bridge?
faqs.a: Tap 'Set up Cloud Bridge' when prompted (or in Settings → Tuya Cloud Bridge). Follow 5-step wizard: create free Tuya IoT trial → cloud project → link Smart Life → paste Client ID + Secret → done.

faqs.q: What is VPD-centric automation?
faqs.a: Our automation engine prioritizes Vapor Pressure Deficit. Sensors feed VPD calculations; rules trigger humidifier/dehumidifier/fan based on VPD bands per growth stage.

faqs.q: What happens when I change grow stage?
faqs.a: Blueprint auto-setpoints push new targets (temp/RH/CO2/VPD/PPFD) to all connected devices for that tent. Single tap, whole tent re-targets.

faqs.q: What's the Emergency override?
faqs.a: D2 mode. Triggers when air temp >maxTemp + 2°C OR dewpoint within 0.5°C of air temp (condensation imminent). Bypasses cooldowns, forces 100% exhaust + cooling. Notifies user.

faqs.q: How does Auto stage detection work?
faqs.a: 6h periodic worker analyzes photoperiod (18h → veg, 12h → flower, 23h → autoflower veg), VWC dryback %, and elapsed days. Proposes transitions via notification with Confirm/Dismiss buttons. Never auto-applies.

faqs.q: Will my grow die if the cloud goes down?
faqs.a: No. We talk LAN direct to your devices. Tuya v3.5 LAN, AC Infinity, Mars Hydro, Spider Farmer, Vivosun all keep working when our cloud or vendor cloud is offline.

faqs.q: Does it work in 24/0 light cycle for autoflowers?
faqs.a: Yes. Blueprint allows custom photoperiods. Day/night offsets only apply when light schedule reports off — for 24/0 cycles, night offsets never trigger.

faqs.q: How do I track multiple strains in one grow?
faqs.a: Multi-strain editor on New Grow form. Add multiple strains with per-strain plant counts. Each auto-creates a row in Strain table with seed count decrement.

faqs.q: Can I share my grow with friends?
faqs.a: Yes — Diary → grow detail → Export → Share. Includes photos, harvest data, timeline. PDF or JSON.

faqs.q: How do I water 5 plants at once?
faqs.a: Long-press grow card → multi-select bottom action bar → Water all. Single dialog assembles N entries in atomic transaction.

faqs.q: What happens at harvest?
faqs.a: Tap 'Mark as harvested' CTA OR 'Harvested' stage in timeline. HarvestDialog asks wet/dry weights + date + notes. CuringDialog follows. HarvestStatsCard shows cycle time, total yield, per-plant, wet/dry ratio.

faqs.q: Can I edit a harvest later?
faqs.a: Yes. HarvestStatsCard shows 'Edit harvest' button → opens HarvestDialog pre-filled with current values.

faqs.q: What do I get with Pro?
faqs.a: Unlimited tents/devices/photos, all 8 smart automation platforms, substrate drybacks, blueprint auto-setpoints, multi-device sync, BLE sensors, AI disease, exports, photo watermarking, Tuya Cloud Bridge wizard, Hub mode, no ads ever.

faqs.q: Should I buy Lifetime or Yearly?
faqs.a: Lifetime ($49.99) breaks even after ~12 months vs Monthly. If you plan to use the app for 1+ year, Lifetime is cheaper. Lifetime also includes ALL future Pro features forever.

faqs.q: Can I downgrade from Pro to Free?
faqs.a: Yes, at next billing cycle. Existing Pro data (extra tents/devices) remains visible but read-only after downgrade.

faqs.q: What happens to my data if I cancel Pro?
faqs.a: Local data is yours forever — no deletion. Cloud sync stops. Diary, photos, history all stay on your phone.

faqs.q: Why is my Tuya plug slow to respond?
faqs.a: Without Cloud Bridge: 5-10s polling. With Cloud Bridge: ~ms latency via Pulsar push. Set up bridge for instant feedback.

faqs.q: My BLE sensor disconnected?
faqs.a: Re-scan in Settings → BLE sensor. Some sensors auto-reconnect; others need manual re-pair after phone restart.

faqs.q: Where are my photos stored?
faqs.a: On your phone under app's private storage. Hidden from device gallery if you enable 'Hide photos from gallery' in Settings → Privacy.

faqs.q: How do I export my full diary?
faqs.a: Diary → grow detail → Export → PDF (full, with photos) or JSON (data only, for backup). Pro feature.

faqs.q: App crashed — what should I do?
faqs.a: Crashlytics is opt-in (off by default in debug). Enable in Settings → Crash Reporting if you want crashes auto-uploaded. Otherwise email a screenshot to support@growvpd.pro.

faqs.q: What data does GrowVPD Pro collect?
faqs.a: Local-first by default. Crash Reporting (opt-in) sends stack traces + device model + Android version + app version + 5 anonymous custom keys. NO photos, NO sensor readings, NO plant info, NO email.

faqs.q: Where does my data live?
faqs.a: On your phone in Room SQLite DB. Smart device control hits vendor cloud per their privacy policies. Multi-device sync goes phone-to-phone via LAN with Cloud Relay fallback (Ed25519 encrypted, we can't decrypt).

faqs.q: Are my photos uploaded anywhere?
faqs.a: No. Photos live in app's private storage on your phone. Watermarked photos can be optionally exported to your gallery for sharing.

faqs.q: Do you sell my data?
faqs.a: No. Never. We make money from Pro subscriptions only.

faqs.q: How do I delete all my data?
faqs.a: Settings → Delete all data. Wipes Room DB, photos, preferences. Cloud Relay queue cleared on next sync.

faqs.q: What is Hub mode?
faqs.a: Designate one phone as 24/7 relay anchor. Always-on for cloud relay, BLE sensor keep-alive, automation polling. Best on a spare/dedicated phone left at home. Pro feature.

faqs.q: Does Hub mode work on iOS?
faqs.a: Limited. iOS App Store policy doesn't allow persistent foreground services for our use case. We use APNs silent push + BGTaskScheduler + bluetooth-central mode. Best-effort, not 24/7. For true 24/7 relay we recommend an Android Hub phone.

faqs.q: How do I set up Hub mode?
faqs.a: Settings → Hub mode → 'Use this phone as Hub' → grant battery whitelist permission (Android) or enable Background App Refresh + Push Notifications (iOS).

faqs.q: Why do I need Cloud Bridge for some Tuya devices?
faqs.a: Battery WiFi sensors (wsdcg TH, co2bj CO2, ldcg illuminance) are firmware-blocked from LAN access. They publish only to Tuya cloud. Cloud Bridge subscribes to your own free Tuya IoT trial's per-user MQTT stream.

faqs.q: How long does Cloud Bridge setup take?
faqs.a: 5 minutes if you follow the wizard. ~15-30 min realistic for first-timers. ~50-60% first-time completion rate (we're improving with video tutorials in 11 languages).

faqs.q: Is Cloud Bridge free?
faqs.a: Yes — uses Tuya's free IoT developer trial (50-device cap per user, not shared). Pro tier required to use the bridge feature in our app.

faqs.q: What if Tuya raises the device cap?
faqs.a: We'd switch to commercial Tuya tier ($25k/yr, viable at 1000+ paid users) and migrate everyone off their own dev accounts transparently.

faqs.q: What if my Tuya trial saturates?
faqs.a: Witness saturation detection fires a notification (24h cooldown, max 3 prompts) suggesting bridge re-link or Zigbee swap.

solutions: Enable Crash Reporting opt-in or email support
Local data lives in app's private storage; uninstall removes it
Multi-device sync (Pro) restores from paired phone
VPD chart with 2+ week range uses hourly rollups

tuya.solution: Expected (15-60min); switch to Zigbee for live data
Wait for adaptive backoff (30s → 2min → 10min → 1h); set up Cloud Bridge as fallback

tuya.issue: Cloud Bridge wizard says wrong region
tuya.solution: Tap 'Switch to <region>'; trial credentials are tied to one region
Witness fallback prompts for bridge setup automatically
Fixed in tuya_v35_lan_working.md; update to current build

ac_infinity.solution: Confirm devType is 22 (Outlet AI+); we route via modeAndSetting PUT
Dual-unit fix shipped: writes both devHt AND devHtf
Schedule sentinel is 65535 (we send correctly now)

mars_hydro_spider_farmer.issue: Device not responding after password change
BLE MAC differs from device PID
mars_hydro_spider_farmer.solution: We try ±1, ±2 on last byte and cache working one
iHub type='hub' fix; multi-port fan control on ports 1-4
Engine validates iControl presence per rule

vivosun.solution: AWS IoT max session length; auto-reconnects

bluelab.solution: Edenic uses 400 as rate-limit signal; retry with exponential backoff (2s × 10 max)
Track creation date, warn at T-30 days, deep-link to app.edenic.io/api-keys

bluelab.issue: EC reads ppm but I want mS/cm
bluelab.solution: Conductivity unit selector preference (mS/cm / µS/cm / ppm 500 / ppm 700)
Read additionalInfo.deviceSubType for Guardian Monitor vs Connect

bluelab.issue: Both API key AND organization_id required
bluelab.solution: Yes, two separate fields in config

sanlight.solution: Protocol uses guessed UUIDs from APK reverse engineering; not 100% reliable
Use 0-10V GrowControl adapter (Wieland → RJ45) on each EVO luminaire, connect to AC Infinity for stable dimming control

hub_mode.solution: Grant battery whitelist permission via Settings → Hub mode → Battery whitelist wizard
Expected; iOS limits silent push to ~2-3/hour reliably; Hub mode on iOS is best-effort, not 24/7

multi_device_sync.solution: Verify both phones on same LAN OR both have Cloud Relay enabled
HLC clock prevents this; if seen, file a bug with sync logs
Tap 'Sync now' button in Settings to force immediate retry
